title: sempervivum × alatum
intro: Sempervivum × alatum, also known as 'Alata', is a hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sempervivum × alatum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine.
